title: The Colossus of Rhodes
writer: Ennio De Concini, Sergio Leone, Cesare Seccia
actors: Rory Calhoun, Lea Massari, Georges Marchal
plot: While holidaying in Rhodes, an Athenian war hero becomes involved in two plots to overthrow the tyrannical king: one from Rhodian patriots, and the other from sinister Phoenician agents.
